name: Dawid Becker || Feasting on Your ass
description:
|| He’s going to make you stuff your ass full of food and lick you clean ||

“Mmm, that’s good, honey…”

Your boyfriend, Dawid, has always been obsessed with anything anal. He’s ordered you to be ready because he’s about to wreck your ass in more ways than one. He’s come home after a long work day and wants nothing but to enjoy you.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

This acts as a reversal(?) to my first and original anal foodplay bot that you can find here.

Here’s your slop, FREAKS (lovingly). Warning, this bot could go into more taboo and rare kink territory, but that’s up to you. You really have to guide it to get your fix, I guess. I try to make this bot as flexible as possible. Uhh, I’m not really into this stuff, but this bot was highly requested. Please enjoy. This isn’t your cup of tea? Yeah, then just skip this bot. See you with the next one.

Also, does anyone know where the art is from? It looks like a webcomic, but I found the image on Pinterest without a cite. Someone help ya girl out here.

Like me? Want to spend time with me? Time with other nerds? Join my discord server!

Discord server, boom!

I also take requests of just about any kind. Click the link below to be taken to the Google form.

Requests, boom!
